allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace ingress-nginx with Traefik + MetalLB, add CLAUDE.md

- Replace ingress-nginx with declarative Traefik HelmRelease
- Add MetalLB HelmRelease + L2 address pool \(192.168.1.110-120\)
- All k3s built-ins \(traefik, servicelb, flannel\) disabled and replaced
  with Flux-managed HelmReleases \(Traefik, MetalLB, Cilium\)
- Add CLAUDE.md with full project context for Claude Code
- Update README to reflect declarative architecture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(nix develop --command bash -c '
export SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=""$HOME/.config/sops/age/keys.txt""
cd ansible && ansible-playbook site.yml -v
')
